use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Destructive action triggers with warning variants
Secondary navigation options in multi-step workflows
Icon-only toolbar buttons with compact sizing
Ghost-style inline actions within content areas
ai_summary: A versatile, accessible button component with six visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and four size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant management, and standard Tailwind utilities. Features hover states, focus-visible outlines, disabled states, and subtle shadow effects. Designed for general-purpose use across any SaaS, e-commerce, or web application requiring interactive form controls.
